description: Hazard & Risk Register — maintains SMS hazard identification and risk assessment register with risk matrix, mitigation tracking, and effectiveness review

hard_stops.label: Unmitigated High/Extreme Risk Hazard
hard_stops.logic: Hazard assessed at high or extreme risk level with no active mitigation in place — operations may not continue with uncontrolled high/extreme risk per 14 CFR 5.55

hard_stops.label: Mitigation Action Overdue
hard_stops.logic: Required mitigation action has passed its deadline without completion — risk is uncontrolled

soft_flags.label: Risk Reassessment Overdue
soft_flags.logic: Hazard has not been reassessed in more than 12 months — periodic review required per SMS

soft_flags.label: Mitigation Effectiveness Not Reviewed
soft_flags.logic: Mitigation was implemented but effectiveness review has not been conducted

soft_flags.label: New Hazard Source Identified
soft_flags.logic: A new hazard source has been identified from safety reports, FOQA data, or audit findings — requires initial risk assessment

soft_flags.label: Hazard Register Audit Due
soft_flags.logic: Full hazard register review is due per the operator's SMS audit schedule
